K(H)end,function(h,w)local K=p(w)local Z=function(Z,c,n,d,H)return v(h,{Z,c;n;d;H},w,K)end return Z end,function(h,w)local K=p(w)local Z=function(Z)return v(h,{Z},w,K)end return Z end,function(h)local
